allow: Bash(cat packages/core/package.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(cd D:/makefun/do-what/do-what-new && for f in projection ack-overlay reconcile-tracker governance-lease integration-gate; do echo "=== $f ===" && node packages/core/dist/__tests__/$f.test.js 2>&1 | grep -E "fail|Error|stale|actual" | head -5; done)

Bash(cd D:/makefun/do-what/do-what-new && for f in hot-state-bootstrap native-surface-report topology-validator baseline-lock focus-surface; do echo "=== $f ===" && node packages/core/dist/__tests__/$f.test.js 2>&1 | grep -E "^ℹ \(fail|pass\)" | head -3; done)

Bash(cd D:/makefun/do-what/do-what-new && for f in migration approval-machine engine-machine policy-engine dag-builder fast-gate integrator event-bus database-worker sync-async-split ui-api; do echo -n "$f: " && node packages/core/dist/__tests__/$f.test.js 2>&1 | grep "^ℹ fail"; done)
